prompt: Create a high-energy vertical anime concert illustration of an all-female gothic rock band performing live on a dark indoor stage. The image should feel like a dramatic festival moment, with intense purple, magenta, blue, and white spotlights, haze, lens glow, metal truss ceiling, confetti-like sparkles, and a packed audience in the foreground raising silhouetted hands in rock-sign gestures. Show exactly 4 visible band members: 1) the central lead singer and guitarist, a young woman with long flowing dark brown hair with pink highlights, amber eyes, black choker, layered necklaces, studded black leather jacket, black graphic top, plaid mini skirt, fishnet stockings, thigh garter, bracelets, chains, and lace-up boots, singing into a black microphone while playing a dark red electric guitar; 2) the left bassist, a cool-looking young woman with short lavender bob hair, black choker, black gothic outfit, plaid skirt, fishnets, holding a purple bass guitar near a microphone stand; 3) the rear drummer, a smaller young woman with dark hair behind a drum kit, smiling while playing, with a stylized white band logo on the bass drum; 4) the right keyboardist and backing vocalist, a young woman with dark twin-tail hair with pink accents, black gothic outfit and plaid skirt, singing into a microphone while standing behind a keyboard labeled Roland. The central performer should dominate the composition from head to thigh, placed slightly left of center, with the guitar neck rising diagonally upward. Use a polished Japanese anime style with detailed linework, glossy highlights, expressive faces, flowing hair, dramatic stage lighting, realistic instrument details, and a vivid live-performance atmosphere. Add a large abstract white band-logo graphic on the back wall behind the performers. Customizable details: band name/logo text stylized unreadable gothic logo, lead singer hair color dark brown with pink highlights, lighting palette purple, magenta, blue, and white, stage mood explosive live festival energy, keyboard brand label Roland. Avoid photorealism, avoid extra band members, avoid readable unrelated text, and keep the image vertical with a close crowd perspective.
promptEn: Create a high-energy vertical anime concert illustration of an all-female gothic rock band performing live on a dark indoor stage. The image should feel like a dramatic festival moment, with intense purple, magenta, blue, and white spotlights, haze, lens glow, metal truss ceiling, confetti-like sparkles, and a packed audience in the foreground raising silhouetted hands in rock-sign gestures. Show exactly 4 visible band members: 1) the central lead singer and guitarist, a young woman with long flowing dark brown hair with pink highlights, amber eyes, black choker, layered necklaces, studded black leather jacket, black graphic top, plaid mini skirt, fishnet stockings, thigh garter, bracelets, chains, and lace-up boots, singing into a black microphone while playing a dark red electric guitar; 2) the left bassist, a cool-looking young woman with short lavender bob hair, black choker, black gothic outfit, plaid skirt, fishnets, holding a purple bass guitar near a microphone stand; 3) the rear drummer, a smaller young woman with dark hair behind a drum kit, smiling while playing, with a stylized white band logo on the bass drum; 4) the right keyboardist and backing vocalist, a young woman with dark twin-tail hair with pink accents, black gothic outfit and plaid skirt, singing into a microphone while standing behind a keyboard labeled Roland. The central performer should dominate the composition from head to thigh, placed slightly left of center, with the guitar neck rising diagonally upward. Use a polished Japanese anime style with detailed linework, glossy highlights, expressive faces, flowing hair, dramatic stage lighting, realistic instrument details, and a vivid live-performance atmosphere. Add a large abstract white band-logo graphic on the back wall behind the performers. Customizable details: band name/logo text stylized unreadable gothic logo, lead singer hair color dark brown with pink highlights, lighting palette purple, magenta, blue, and white, stage mood explosive live festival energy, keyboard brand label Roland. Avoid photorealism, avoid extra band members, avoid readable unrelated text, and keep the image vertical with a close crowd perspective.
promptZh: 创作一张高能量的竖版动漫演唱会插画，描绘一支全女子哥特摇滚乐队在昏暗的室内舞台上进行现场表演。画面应呈现出戏剧性的音乐节氛围，配以强烈的紫色、洋红色、蓝色和白色聚光灯、烟雾、镜头光晕、金属桁架天花板、如五彩纸屑般的闪光，以及前景中挤满观众并举起手做出摇滚手势的剪影。画面中需清晰展示 4 名乐队成员：1) 中央的主唱兼吉他手，一位留着飘逸深棕色长发并带有粉色挑染的年轻女性，琥珀色眼睛，佩戴黑色颈圈、叠戴项链，身穿铆钉黑色皮夹克、黑色印花上衣、格子短裙、渔网袜、大腿袜带、手链、链条和系带靴，一边对着黑色麦克风唱歌，一边弹奏深红色电吉他；2) 左侧的贝斯手，一位外表冷酷、留着紫色波波短发的年轻女性，佩戴黑色颈圈，身穿黑色哥特服饰、格子短裙、渔网袜，在麦克风架旁手持紫色贝斯；3) 后方的鼓手，一位留着深色头发的娇小年轻女性，坐在架子鼓后微笑着演奏，低音鼓上印有风格化的白色乐队 Logo；4) 右侧的键盘手兼伴唱，一位留着深色双马尾并带有粉色点缀的年轻女性，身穿黑色哥特服饰和格子短裙，站在标有 Roland 的键盘后对着麦克风唱歌。中央表演者应占据构图的头部至大腿位置，略微偏左，吉他琴颈呈对角线向上延伸。采用精致的日系动漫风格，注重细节线条、光泽高光、生动的表情、飘逸的头发、戏剧性的舞台灯光、逼真的乐器细节以及生动的现场表演氛围。在表演者身后的背景墙上添加一个巨大的抽象白色乐队 Logo 图形。可自定义细节：乐队名称/Logo 文字 风格化的不可读哥特 Logo，主唱发色 深棕色带粉色挑染，灯光色调 紫色、洋红色、蓝色和白色，舞台氛围 爆炸性的现场音乐节活力，键盘品牌标签 Roland。避免照片写实风格，避免出现额外的乐队成员，避免出现可读的无关文字，并保持竖版构图及近距离的观众视角。
